title: Rust lichen-node dispatch_udp: NotUdp vs UnknownPort distinction may be surprising
description: In rust/lichen-node/src/node.rs, dispatch_udp() was changed from returning Option<Result<...>> to Result<..., UdpDispatchError>. The new UdpDispatchError::NotUdp variant combines multiple cases: wrong IPv6 version, wrong next header, and truncated headers. This is a semantic improvement but callers expecting None for non-UDP packets now need to match on Err(UdpDispatchError::NotUdp). The change is correct but could benefit from documenting the migration path for existing callers.
close_reason: UdpDispatchError change is correct - documentation exists in function doc comments
